steps.title: Identify the sampled group
steps.content: The sample contained only Gala apples. Therefore, the sample can support a conclusion about Gala apples, not about all apples in the orchard.

steps.title: Use the sample percentage
steps.content: In the random sample of Gala apples, $25\%$ weighed more than $5$ ounces. The supported conclusion is that approximately the same percent of all Gala apples in the orchard weigh more than $5$ ounces. The answer is D.
